description: Machine-readable index of every @app.function in the jx notebook catalog. Generated by scripts/build_catalog.py — do not edit by hand.

functions.name: load_profile_index
functions.docstring: Fetch the JUMP profile manifest as a list of subset entries.

functions.name: load_profiles
functions.docstring: Lazy-scan the parquet file for a named JUMP subset (e.g. 'crispr').

functions.name: profile_stats
functions.docstring: Row/column/size stats for each named subset.

functions.name: sample_with_negcon
functions.signature: (profiles: pl.LazyFrame, n: int, seed: int = 42, negcon: str = NEGCON_JCP) -> tuple[str, ...]
functions.docstring: Sample n perturbation IDs from a profile frame, appending a known negcon.

functions.name: build_mapper
functions.docstring: broad-babel mapper from JCP2022 IDs to any metadata column.

functions.name: annotate_profiles
functions.docstring: Filter to a JCP subsample and attach pert_type + standard name columns.

functions.name: filter_to_complete_plates
functions.signature: (profiles: pl.LazyFrame, jcp_ids: tuple[str, ...], negcon: str = NEGCON_JCP) -> pl.DataFrame
functions.docstring: Collect sampled perturbations plus every row on the plates they live on.

functions.name: attach_pert_type
functions.docstring: Attach a broad-babel `pert_type` column to a profile frame.

functions.name: compute_map
functions.signature: (df: pl.DataFrame, pos_sameby: list[str], pos_diffby: list[str], neg_sameby: list[str], neg_diffby: list[str], batch_size: int = COPAIRS_BATCH_SIZE) -> pl.DataFrame
functions.docstring: Run copairs average-precision with arbitrary same-by / diff-by columns.

functions.name: lookup_site_metadata
functions.docstring: Resolve a gene / InChIKey / JCP ID to jump_portrait imaging site rows.

functions.name: pick_first_site
functions.docstring: Return the first imaging site as a {Source, Batch, Plate, Well, Site} dict.

functions.name: display_site
functions.signature: (source: str, batch: str, plate: str, well: str, site: str | int, label: str, int_percentile: float = 99.5)
functions.docstring: Plot all 5 JUMP channels from one imaging site as a 2x3 grid with a label.

functions.name: latest_zenodo_id
functions.docstring: Resolve the latest versioned record ID for a Zenodo concept record.

functions.name: load_distance_matrix
functions.docstring: Lazy-scan the all-vs-all cosine similarity matrix for a dataset.

functions.name: sample_submatrix
functions.signature: (distances: pl.LazyFrame, n: int, rseed: int = 42) -> pl.DataFrame
functions.docstring: Pick n random rows+cols and return the corresponding square submatrix.

functions.name: plot_similarity_heatmap
functions.docstring: Render a labeled square cosine similarity heatmap (1=identical, -1=anticorrelated).

functions.name: gene_symbols_to_ncbi
functions.docstring: Resolve a tuple of gene symbols to their NCBI Gene IDs via broad-babel.

functions.name: entrez_gene_info
functions.signature: (ncbi_ids: tuple[str, ...], email: str, fields: tuple[str, ...] = ENTREZ_FIELDS) -> pl.DataFrame
functions.docstring: Fetch Entrez gene summaries for a list of NCBI Gene IDs.

functions.name: parse_gene_list
functions.docstring: Split a comma-separated gene symbol string into a cleaned tuple.

functions.name: load_similarity_matrix
functions.docstring: Lazy-scan the cosine-similarity matrix, preferring the local cache.

functions.name: nearest_neighbors
functions.signature: (similarities: pl.LazyFrame, query_jcp: str, k: int) -> pl.DataFrame
functions.docstring: Top-k JCP2022 IDs by cosine similarity to a query (excluding self).

functions.name: symbols_to_jcp
functions.docstring: Map gene symbols → JCP2022 IDs via broad-babel standard_key lookup.

functions.name: load_sim_cached
functions.docstring: Load cosine similarity matrix, serving from local cache when available.

functions.name: gene_submatrix
functions.docstring: Extract the square submatrix for a specific set of JCP2022 IDs.

functions.name: plot_gene_heatmap
functions.docstring: Seaborn heatmap of pairwise cosine similarities, labelled by gene symbol.

functions.name: fetch_wells
functions.docstring: Pull all compound wells for a JCP2022 ID, using a local cache of profiles.

functions.name: pairwise_cosine_labeled
functions.docstring: Compute all well-pair cosine similarities, labelled within- vs cross-source.

functions.name: source_pair_summary
functions.docstring: Mean and std cosine similarity for each source × source pair.

functions.name: pairwise_cosine_by_plate
functions.docstring: Pairwise cosine similarities labelled within-plate vs cross-plate.

functions.name: plate_pair_summary
functions.docstring: Mean cosine similarity for each plate × plate pair.
